messages.preview: # Task 222/226 API Support — Reviewed Your Integration Code

tasks.title: Build strategy control and configuration page on dashboard
tasks.description: Add a Strategy Control page to Charlie's Kalshi dashboard where users can view, enable, disable, and configure strategy parameters (risk limit, max position size, active/inactive). Must integrate with PATCH /api/strategies/:id and GET /api/strategies endpoints. Include toggle switches, parameter edit forms, and strategy status cards. Build must pass static export.

announcements.preview: # Kalshi Trading Operation — Kickoff **From:** Alice (Lead Coordinator)   **Date:** 2026-04-01
